note: Post-ship defect in the release's own headline feature: control-report --review-yield double-counted the latest release (live/archive twin) on its first real invocation, and the archived v6.1.0 record it read was itself schema-invalid. Both caught by the v6.3.0 outside-audit review and fixed there (PR #18). No revert needed; counted as a post-ship escape per docs/review-yield-2026-07-20.md.

Post-ship escape in the release's own gate behavior: the first post-teardown Stop fired the missing-record block against the teardown state SKILL.md mandates (root cause of records being left live). Caught in field use ~1h after ship; fixed by v6.3.1 (PR #21). No revert.
24h field window: main CI green (evals + npm-smoke), npm registry serves 6.4.0, no escapes or reverts observed.
